banner.title: FullStack Developer - SAP Business Technology Platform
banner.description: I develop, automate and integrate systems, platforms and applications through code, interfaces, bots and APIs. Experience in JavaScript and front-end and back-end web development.

about.name: Iwinser Sanchez
about.description: I build comprehensive software solutions for organizations, ranging from SAP BTP environments—leveraging SAP Build for automation and SAP CPI for seamless integration—to bespoke cloud applications. My primary technical stack includes Node.js, React, MongoDB, and SQL. I specialize in building robust integrations with third-party platforms, streamlining complex business logic, and delivering scalable solutions tailored to my clients' unique business needs.
about.certificationsDescription: I am currently pursuing a Systems Engineering degree at UNAD, which I combine with a solid technical foundation obtained at the Faculty of Engineering of the University of Antioquia (Misión TIC 2022). My professional approach is based on continuous learning, constantly specializing in modern architectures and high-impact technologies through leading platforms and cutting-edge technical resources.

skills.title: Skills
skills.frontendDescription: Frontend development is about more than visual design. My focus is on building intuitive, responsive, and adaptable applications that improve users' daily workflows. In enterprise environments, the internal user experience is especially important because employees interact with the software for most of their workday. For this reason, I prioritize usability, efficiency, and streamlined workflows to make every process faster, simpler, and more productive.
skills.backendDescription: A robust backend is more than an API that meets functional requirements. My approach is to build secure, scalable, and maintainable services that evolve alongside business needs. I implement authentication and authorization mechanisms, along with traceability, structured logging, and error-handling strategies that simplify monitoring and enable rapid root cause analysis. This results in reliable systems that are easier to maintain and ready to support future business requirements without compromising stability.
